courses.title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
courses.description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch using modern tools.
courses.full_details: This comprehensive bootcamp takes you from a complete beginner to a confident full-stack developer. You will master the fundamentals of the web, build responsive front-end interfaces, and develop robust back-end logic with databases.
curriculum: Introduction to HTML5 and Semantic Tags

courses.title: React JS Mastery
courses.description: Master modern React development with hooks and advanced patterns.
courses.full_details: This course dives deep into React, teaching you how to build scalable and high-performance applications using real-world patterns.

courses.title: Next.js Full Guide
courses.full_details: Learn server-side rendering, static generation, API routes, and deployment using Next.js.

courses.title: Node.js Backend Development
courses.description: Build scalable backend systems using Node.js.
courses.full_details: Learn how to create APIs, manage authentication, and structure backend applications.

courses.title: UI/UX Design Fundamentals
courses.full_details: Understand user experience, wireframing, prototyping, and design tools like Figma.

courses.title: JavaScript Advanced Concepts
courses.description: Deep dive into advanced JavaScript concepts.
courses.full_details: Explore closures, prototypes, async programming, and performance optimization.
